keyEvents.text: Own Goal by Julanni Archibald, St. Kitts And Nevis.  Jamaica 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0.
Goal!  Jamaica 2, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Jon Russell (Jamaica) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Leon Bailey.
Substitution, Jamaica. Daniel Johnson replaces Jon Russell.
Substitution, Jamaica. Shamar Nicholson replaces Michail Antonio.
Malique Roberts (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  Jamaica 3, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Di'Shon Bernard (Jamaica) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Daniel Johnson   following a set piece situation.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Mervin Lewis replaces Raheem Somersall because of an injury.
